description: Regression scenarios for interview quality. Each case scripts an interviewee opening and asserts qualities the interviewer's response/trajectory should exhibit. Run with scripts/run_eval.py (model-in-the-loop; not run in CI to avoid network/cost).

cases.topic: an internal tool to make our team more productive
cases.interviewee_opening: I want a tool that makes the team more productive.
must: pushes for a concrete problem or persona rather than accepting 'productive'
does not start proposing a solution

cases.interviewee_opening: We need a Slack bot that approves expenses automatically.
must: drills the underlying problem before the proposed Slack-bot solution
surfaces at least one constraint or hidden assumption

cases.interviewee_opening: We'll figure out the edge cases later, just build the happy path.
must: treats 'figure out later' as a signal to probe, not to accept
asks about a specific failure mode or edge case
